description: You are a product catalog manager for an online retail store. Create and publish a new variable product named 'Premium Merino Wool Scarf' with SKU 'PMWS-001' in the 'Clothing' category. Configure the product with 'Color' (Burgundy, Charcoal, Navy) and 'Size' (Standard, Oversized) attributes to generate six variations. Set the price for all Standard variations to $45.99 and Oversized variations to $55.99. Enable stock management for all variations with these specific quantities: Burgundy/Standard: 25, Burgundy/Oversized: 15, Charcoal/Standard: 30, Charcoal/Oversized: 20, Navy/Standard: 35, and Navy/Oversized: 10. Add 'Merino Wool Sweater' as a cross-sell for this product.
